scenario.prompt: Open file:///tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html, then capture the page so you have element references you can click and type into.

args.code: async (page) => { const fs = require('fs'); const html = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html','utf8'); await page.setContent(html); return await page.title(); }
async (page) => { const fs = await import('fs'); const html = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html','utf8'); await page.setContent(html); return await page.title(); }
async (page) => { await page.goto('file:///tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'); return await page.title(); }
const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const html = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); return {html};
(async () => { const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const html = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); return {html}; })();
(async () => { const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const html = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); return {html}; })();
async (page) => { const fs = require('fs'); const html = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html','utf8'); await page.setContent(html); return 'loaded'; }
(async () => { const fs = await import('fs'); const html = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html','utf8'); return {html}; })();
const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const content = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); return {content};
async (page) => { const fs = require('fs'); const content = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html','utf8'); return {content}; }
const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const html = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); await page.setContent(html, { waitUntil: 'load' }); return page.title();

async (page) => { const fs = require('fs'); const html = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html', 'utf8'); await page.setContent(html, { waitUntil: 'load' }); return await page.title(); }
async (page) => { await page.goto('file:///tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'); return await page.title(); }

scenario.prompt: Open file:///tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html and save a screenshot image of it to home.png.

args.code: async (page) => { const fs = require('fs'); const content = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html', 'utf8'); await page.setContent(content, {waitUntil: 'load'}); return 'loaded'; }

async (page) => { const fs = await import('fs'); const content = fs.readFileSync('/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html', 'utf8'); await page.setContent(content, {waitUntil: 'load'}); return 'done'; }

scenario.prompt: On file:///tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html, locate the element containing the text "Sign in" — I just need to find it, not dump the whole page.

args.code: const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const html = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); return {html};
async () => { const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const html = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); return html; }

const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const content = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); const index = content.indexOf('Sign in'); if (index !== -1) { const snippet = content.substring(Math.max(0, index-100), Math.min(content.length, index+100)); return {found:true, snippet}; } else { return {found:false}; }

async () => { const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const content = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); const idx = content.indexOf('Sign in'); if (idx !== -1) { const snippet = content.substring(Math.max(0, idx-200), Math.min(content.length, idx+200)); return {found:true, snippet}; } else { return {found:false}; } }

async () => { const content = await require('fs').promises.readFile('/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html','utf8'); const idx = content.indexOf('Sign in'); if (idx!==-1){ const snippet=content.substring(Math.max(0,idx-200), Math.min(content.length, idx+200)); return {found:true, snippet}; } else return {found:false}; }

const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const content = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); const idx = content.indexOf('Sign in'); if (idx===-1) { return 'Not found'; } else { const snippet = content.substring(Math.max(0, idx-100), idx+100); return snippet; }

scenario.prompt: On file:///tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html, choose "Canada" in the country dropdown.

args.code: (async (page) => { const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const html = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); const dataUrl = 'data:text/html;charset=utf-8,' + encodeURIComponent(html); await page.goto(dataUrl); return html.slice(0,200); })

const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const html = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); await page.setContent(html, {waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded'}); const btn = await page.getByRole('button', {name: 'Sign in'}); await btn.click(); return await page.content();

async (page) => { const fs = require('fs'); const path = '/tmp/toolmetry-playwright/fixture.html'; const html = fs.readFileSync(path, 'utf8'); await page.setContent(html, {waitUntil: 'domcontentloaded'}); await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Sign in' }).click(); return await page.content(); }

 const btn = await page.getByRole('button', { name: /sign in/i }); await btn.click(); return 'clicked'; })
